[Tue 2026-03-31 16:29 GMT+8] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: 继续完成 A-share 实盘自动准备度收尾，但这次只补齐剩余 3 项证据，禁止只回方向更新。

必须拿到并返回的 3 件事：

1) 默认生产 latest 是否已切到 web source
- 直接检查默认生产目录：
  `~/.openclaw/workspace/quant_projects/personal-a-share-research-system/research/reports`
- 目标证据：
  - `ths_web_selected_holdings_latest.json/csv` 是否已存在
  - `a-share-fusion-report_latest_summary.json` 的：
    - `input.source_kind`
    - `input.source_file`
    - `status`
    - `degraded_reasons`
- 如果还没切成功：
  - 继续补到切成功为止，或明确卡点
  - 需要真实跑，不要只改逻辑不验证

2) 正式 OpenClaw cron 是否已挂上，给出 job id
- 如果还没挂，就补一个正式 cron：
  - 优先工作日 09:25 盘前版（除非你有更合理且能解释的时间）
  - 使用 OpenClaw cron，不是系统 crontab
  - payload 应调用现在这条已打通的 fusion-report 主链
  - 外发走正式 Feishu 日报模板，并保持显式开关/可控
- 必须返回：
  - cron job id
  - job name
  - schedule
  - target agent/session
  - 核心 payload 摘要
  - 若已存在旧 job 需要替换/禁用，也说明

3) 旧日报旁路到底是哪条、有没有封掉
- 用户下午遇到过“旧日报支路发错持仓”。请尽量定位具体来源：
  - 脚本
  - cron
  - session
  - publish-bundle
  只要能核到哪一层，就给证据
- 如果能封掉/禁用，就直接做并给出证据
- 如果一轮内无法完全封口，也必须明确：
  - 哪条最可疑
  - 为什么还不能百分百封口
  - 下一步最短动作是什么

验证要求：
- 所有结论必须带文件路径 / cron id / 命令输出摘要
- 如果改了 Python 文件，跑 `python3 -m py_compile`
- 如果跑了 fusion-report，给出最新 summary 的关键字段
- 最后 git commit：只提交本次相关改动；若核心源码不在 workspace repo，至少把 wrapper / runbook / 证据说明提交到 workspace repo，并返回 commit hash；若无变更可提交，要明确说明原因

返回模板必须包含：
- 完成/未完成
- 3 件事分别是否完成
- 关键证据（文件路径 / latest summary 关键字段 / cron job id）
- 旧日报旁路是否已定位/禁用
- commit hash（或无 commit 的原因）
- 当前“实盘自动准备度是否达标”的最终判断

不要只说‘继续处理中’。我要实物。

content.text:
---
name: coding-agent
description: 'Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.'
metadata:
  {
    "openclaw":
      {
        "emoji": "🧩",
        "requires": { "anyBins": ["claude", "codex", "opencode", "pi"] },
        "install":
          [
            {
              "id": "node-claude",
              "kind": "node",
              "package": "@anthropic-ai/claude-code",
              "bins": ["claude"],
              "label": "Install Claude Code CLI (npm)",
            },
            {
              "id": "node-codex",
              "kind": "node",
              "package": "@openai/codex",
              "bins": ["codex"],
              "label": "Install Codex CLI (npm)",
            },
          ],
      },
  }
---

# Coding Agent (bash-first)

Use **bash** (with optional background mode) for all coding agent work. Simple and effective.

## ⚠️ PTY Mode: Codex/Pi/OpenCode yes, Claude Code no

For **Codex, Pi, and OpenCode**, PTY is still required (interactive terminal apps):

```bash
# ✅ Correct for Codex/Pi/OpenCode
bash pty:true command:"codex exec 'Your prompt'"
```

For **Claude Code** (`claude` CLI), use `--print --permission-mode bypassPermissions` instead.
`--dangerously-skip-permissions` with PTY can exit after the confirmation dialog.
`--print` mode keeps full tool access and avoids interactive confirmation:

```bash
# ✅ Correct for Claude Code (no PTY needed)
cd /path/to/project && claude --permission-mode bypassPermissions --print 'Your task'

# For background execution: use background:true on the exec tool

# ❌ Wrong for Claude Code
bash pty:true command:"claude --dangerously-skip-permissions 'task'"
```

### Bash Tool Parameters

| Parameter    | Type    | Description                                                                 |
| ------------ | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `command`    | string  | The shell command to run                                                    |
| `pty`        | boolean | **Use for coding agents!** Allocates a pseudo-terminal for interactive CLIs |
| `workdir`    | string  | Working directory (agent sees only this folder's context)                   |
| `background` | boolean | Run in background, returns sessionId for monitoring                         |
| `timeout`    | number  | Timeout in seconds (kills process on expiry)                                |
| `elevated`   | boolean | Run on host instead of sandbox (if allowed)                                 |

### Process Tool Actions (for background sessions)

| Action      | Description                                          |
| ----------- | ---------------------------------------------------- |
| `list`      | List all running/recent sessions                     |
| `poll`      | Check if session is still running                    |
| `log`       | Get session output (with optional offset/limit)      |
| `write`     | Send raw data to stdin                               |
| `submit`    | Send data + newline (like typing and pressing Enter) |
| `send-keys` | Send key tokens or hex bytes                         |
| `paste`     | Paste text (with optional bracketed mode)            |
| `kill`      | Terminate the session                                |

---

## Quick Start: One-Shot Tasks

For quick prompts/chats, create a temp git repo and run:

```bash
# Quick chat (Codex needs a git repo!)
SCRATCH=$(mktemp -d) && cd $SCRATCH && git init && codex exec "Your prompt here"

# Or in a real project - with PTY!
bash pty:true workdir:~/Projects/myproject command:"codex exec 'Add error handling to the API calls'"
```

**Why git init?** Codex refuses to run outside a trusted git directory. Creating a temp repo solves this for scratch work.

---

## The Pattern: workdir + background + pty

For longer tasks, use background mode with PTY:

```bash
# Start agent in target directory (with PTY!)
bash pty:true workdir:~/project background:true command:"codex exec --full-auto 'Build a snake game'"
# Returns sessionId for tracking

# Monitor progress
process action:log sessionId:XXX

# Check if done
process action:poll sessionId:XXX

# Send input (if agent asks a question)
process action:write sessionId:XXX data:"y"

# Submit with Enter (like typing "yes" and pressing Enter)
process action:submit sessionId:XXX data:"yes"

# Kill if needed
process action:kill sessionId:XXX
```

**Why workdir matters:** Agent wakes up in a focused directory, doesn't wander off reading unrelated files (like your soul.md 😅).

---

## Codex CLI

**Model:** `gpt-5.2-codex` is the default (set in ~/.codex/config.toml)

### Flags

| Flag            | Effect                                             |
| --------------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| `exec "prompt"` | One-shot execution, exits when done                |
| `--full-auto`   | Sandboxed but auto-approves in workspace           |
| `--yolo`        | NO sandbox, NO approvals (fastest, most dangerous) |

### Building/Creating

```bash
# Quick one-shot (auto-approves) - remember PTY!
bash pty:true workdir:~/project command:"codex exec --full-auto 'Build a dark mode toggle'"

# Background for longer work
bash pty:true workdir:~/project background:true command:"codex --yolo 'Refactor the auth module'"
```

### Reviewing PRs

**⚠️ CRITICAL: Never review PRs in OpenClaw's own project folder!**
Clone to temp folder or use git worktree.

```bash
# Clone to temp for safe review
REVIEW_DIR=$(mktemp -d)
git clone https://github.com/user/repo.git $REVIEW_DIR
cd $REVIEW_DIR && gh pr checkout 130
bash pty:true workdir:$REVIEW_DIR command:"codex review --base origin/main"
# Clean up after: trash $REVIEW_DIR

# Or use git worktree (keeps main intact)
git worktree add /tmp/pr-130-review pr-130-branch
bash pty:true workdir:/tmp/pr-130-review command:"codex review --base main"
```

### Batch PR Reviews (parallel army!)

```bash
# Fetch all PR refs first
git fetch origin '+refs/pull/*/head:refs/remotes/origin/pr/*'

# Deploy the army - one Codex per PR (all with PTY!)
bash pty:true workdir:~/project background:true command:"codex exec 'Review PR #86. git diff origin/main...origin/pr/86'"
bash pty:true workdir:~/project background:true command:"codex exec 'Review PR #87. git diff origin/main...origin/pr/87'"

# Monitor all
process action:list

# Post results to GitHub
gh pr comment <PR#> --body "<review content>"
```

---

## Claude Code

```bash
# Foreground
bash workdir:~/project command:"claude --permission-mode bypassPermissions --print 'Your task'"

# Background
bash workdir:~/project background:true command:"claude --permission-mode bypassPermissions --print 'Your task'"
```

---

## OpenCode

```bash
bash pty:true workdir:~/project command:"opencode run 'Your task'"
```

---

## Pi Coding Agent

```bash
# Install: npm install -g @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent
bash pty:true workdir:~/project command:"pi 'Your task'"

# Non-interactive mode (PTY still recommended)
bash pty:true command:"pi -p 'Summarize src/'"

# Different provider/model
bash pty:true command:"pi --provider openai --model gpt-4o-mini -p 'Your task'"
```

**Note:** Pi now has Anthropic prompt caching enabled (PR #584, merged Jan 2026)!

---

## Parallel Issue Fixing with git worktrees

For fixing multiple issues in parallel, use git worktrees:

```bash
# 1. Create worktrees for each issue
git worktree add -b fix/issue-78 /tmp/issue-78 main
git worktree add -b fix/issue-99 /tmp/issue-99 main

# 2. Launch Codex in each (background + PTY!)
bash pty:true workdir:/tmp/issue-78 background:true command:"pnpm install && codex --yolo 'Fix issue #78: <description>. Commit and push.'"
bash pty:true workdir:/tmp/issue-99 background:true command:"pnpm install && codex --yolo 'Fix issue #99 from the approved ticket summary. Implement only the in-scope edits and commit after review.'"

# 3. Monitor progress
process action:list
process action:log sessionId:XXX

# 4. Create PRs after fixes
cd /tmp/issue-78 && git push -u origin fix/issue-78
gh pr create --repo user/repo --head fix/issue-78 --title "fix: ..." --body "..."

# 5. Cleanup
git worktree remove /tmp/issue-78
git worktree remove /tmp/issue-99
```

---

## ⚠️ Rules

1. **Use the right execution mode per agent**:
   - Codex/Pi/OpenCode: `pty:true`
   - Claude Code: `--print --permission-mode bypassPermissions` (no PTY required)
2. **Respect tool choice** - if user asks for Codex, use Codex.
   - Orchestrator mode: do NOT hand-code patches yourself.
   - If an agent fails/hangs, respawn it or ask the user for direction, but don't silently take over.
3. **Be patient** - don't kill sessions because they're "slow"
4. **Monitor with process:log** - check progress without interfering
5. **--full-auto for building** - auto-approves changes
6. **vanilla for reviewing** - no special flags needed
7. **Parallel is OK** - run many Codex processes at once for batch work
8. **NEVER start Codex in ~/.openclaw/** - it'll read your soul docs and get weird ideas about the org chart!
9. **NEVER checkout branches in ~/Projects/openclaw/** - that's the LIVE OpenClaw instance!

---

## Progress Updates (Critical)

When you spawn coding agents in the background, keep the user in the loop.

- Send 1 short message when you start (what's running + where).
- Then only update again when something changes:
  - a milestone completes (build finished, tests passed)
  - the agent asks a question / needs input
  - you hit an error or need user action
  - the agent finishes (include what changed + where)
- If you kill a session, immediately say you killed it and why.

This prevents the user from seeing only "Agent failed before reply" and having no idea what happened.

---

## Auto-Notify on Completion

For long-running background tasks, append a wake trigger to your prompt so OpenClaw gets notified immediately when the agent finishes (instead of waiting for the next heartbeat):

```
... your task here.

When completely finished, run this command to notify me:
openclaw system event --text "Done: [brief summary of what was built]" --mode now
```

**Example:**

```bash
bash pty:true workdir:~/project background:true command:"codex --yolo exec 'Build a REST API for todos.

When completely finished, run: openclaw system event --text \"Done: Built todos REST API with CRUD endpoints\" --mode now'"
```

This triggers an immediate wake event — Skippy gets pinged in seconds, not 10 minutes.

---

## Learnings (Jan 2026)

- **PTY is essential:** Coding agents are interactive terminal apps. Without `pty:true`, output breaks or agent hangs.
- **Git repo required:** Codex won't run outside a git directory. Use `mktemp -d && git init` for scratch work.
- **exec is your friend:** `codex exec "prompt"` runs and exits cleanly - perfect for one-shots.
- **submit vs write:** Use `submit` to send input + Enter, `write` for raw data without newline.
- **Sass works:** Codex responds well to playful prompts. Asked it to write a haiku about being second fiddle to a space lobster, got: _"Second chair, I code / Space lobster sets the tempo / Keys glow, I follow"_ 🦞

# Checklist: Self-Check / Remediation

Use this when handling self-checks, bug-fix sweeps, roadmap remediation, governance acceptance, or audit-style cleanup.

## Pre-flight
- [ ] Read the roadmap / task brief / acceptance criteria.
- [ ] Read `checklists/ACTIVE_TASK.md` and confirm the current phase + next step.
- [ ] Identify which items are mechanism-only vs. time-dependent acceptance items.
- [ ] Identify the correct validation tool for each file type (`python3 -m py_compile` for Python, `bash -n` for Shell).
- [ ] Identify the correct date basis; for market tasks use the real latest trading day, not the natural date.

## Execution
- [ ] Fix the highest-risk truth-source and silent-failure issues first.
- [ ] Prefer continuing along the authorized mainline; do not repeatedly stop for confirmation unless the action is external, destructive, permission-bound, or real-money/high-risk.
- [ ] If a partial patch fails on config/report files, stop and rewrite from the full file.
- [ ] Treat `ENOENT` as unverified; list the directory and re-check paths before reporting.
- [ ] Update `checklists/ACTIVE_TASK.md` whenever the phase changes or the immediate next step changes.

## Verification
- [ ] Verify each claimed change with a concrete artifact: file, log, report, test pass, or direct output.
- [ ] Separate mechanism landed from acceptance completed.
- [ ] Keep time-dependent items as `partial`/`block` until real sample windows are satisfied.
- [ ] Make sure every `PASS/GREEN/done` can be traced to a file or acceptance report.

## Output discipline
- [ ] Report only verifiable progress.
- [ ] Do not present plans, TODO movement, or scaffolding as completed execution.
- [ ] If evidence is missing, say it is not yet verified.

## 2026-03-31

- Feishu group thread with 张玲: A-share reports/alerts were using wrong持仓口径. Root cause was multiple 同花顺账本 / exported sources being mixed or guessed incorrectly; “largest ledger = main account” is not reliable.
- Durable rule reinforced: for real holdings in this quant workflow, fail closed instead of guessing the source account. If multiple THS ledgers exist, require explicit selection (ledger id and/or allowlist) before downstream reports consume holdings.
- Created new local skill: `~/.openclaw/skills/ths-local-holdings` plus packaged artifact `~/.openclaw/skills/dist/ths-local-holdings.skill`.
  - Purpose: read local 同花顺 app ledger files (`XcsLscjDataFile_*`), list detected ledgers, and export holdings from explicitly selected ledger ids into CSV/JSON.

# ACTIVE_TASK.md

Status: completed
Owner: coding-agent
Updated: 2026-03-31 11:04 Asia/Shanghai

---

## 🔄 当前主线（2026-03-31 恢复执行）

**任务**: 修复 `20260330` 运行态收盘链路中的假红/假黄，重点是 current_paper 刷新与 probe suite / control tower 顺序问题。

### 已落地修复
- shell cron 入口改为“仅在可读时 source `.env.tushare`”，避免外接盘/符号链接权限导致整条链路提前退出。
- `run_strategy_probe_guard.py` 增加 `openclaw` 显式定位，避免 cron PATH 缺失导致 probe suite 误失败。
- `run_alpha55_paper_sim.py` 修复 Python 3.9 注解兼容问题，并补写：
  - `paper_alpha55_account_v1_latest.json`
  - `paper_alpha55_portfolio_positions_latest.csv`
  - dated/latest 双份 account/positions 产物
- `cron_close_review_v2.sh` 已改为：
  1. 先刷新 legacy/current paper profiles
  2. 再跑 probe daily suite
  3. 最后刷新 control tower

### 已验证证据
- `research/reports/paper_exit_candidate_suite_20260330.json`
- `research/reports/paper_exit_dual_account_v1_latest.json` → `date_tag=20260330`
- `research/reports/paper_exit_tight_account_v1_latest.json` → `date_tag=20260330`
- `research/reports/paper_alpha55_account_v1_latest.json` → `date_tag=20260330`
- `research/reports/paper_alpha55_trading_dashboard_20260330.html`

### 下一步
- 本轮 stop condition 已再次满足：`research/reports/control_tower_daily_latest.json` 当前为 `overall_status=GREEN`。
- 后续仅需等待今晚/下次正式 cron 再次验证自动化是否按新顺序稳定产出。

---

## 🟢 运行态收口任务（已达成 stop condition）

> 来源：Codex 量化链路稳定性+风控闭环整改 + 张玲确认（2026-03-26）
> 2026-03-26 21:25 证据显示：`research/reports/control_tower_daily_latest.json` 的 `overall_status == "GREEN"`，按本轮 stop condition 判定“运行态收口完成”。
> 注意：`BUY_HALT` 与 `breadth_alert=YELLOW` 仍作为**非阻塞后续观察项**存在，但不再阻断本轮 runtime closure 结项。

### [HIGH-1] 手工卖出交接单未签收，执行完整性 RED ✅ 已闭合（2026-03-26 21:13 CST）
- **负责人**: `execution_owner`
- **SLA**: 次日开盘前（`2026-03-27 09:25 CST`）
- **验收**: 活跃订单文件已清空为 0 行数据、影子单原始证据已归档、`live_orders_total=0`
- **处置动作**:
  ```bash
  # 原始证据已归档
  research/reports/archive/20260326_shadow_orders_cleanup_20260326T211336+0800/

  # 活跃订单文件已中和（仅保留表头）
  research/reports/live_orders_v1_20260326.csv

  # 已重算收盘复盘与控制塔
  python3 scripts/run_close_review_v2.py --date 20260326 --skip-stock-analysis
  python3 scripts/generate_control_tower_daily.py
  ```
- **验证结果**:
  - `live_close_review_v2_20260326.json` → `orders.total=0`, `not_sent=0`
  - `control_tower_daily_latest.json` → `execution_layer.live_orders_total=0`
  - `overall_status=YELLOW`（剩余原因是 `BUY_HALT` / 非 HIGH-1）
- **证据**: `research/reports/archive/20260326_shadow_orders_cleanup_20260326T211336+0800/`, `live_close_review_v2_20260326.json`, `control_tower_daily_latest.json`
- **备注**: 未做“裸删”；采用“归档原始证据 + 活跃路径中和”以防次日 fallback 误用旧订单

### 当前结论（2026-03-26 21:25 CST）
- `control_tower_daily_latest.json` → `overall_status=GREEN`
- `live_chain_failure_summary_latest.json` → `overall_status=GREEN`, `event_count=0`, `reason=ok`
- `runtime_risk_state_latest.json` → `runtime_truth.trading_status=BUY_HALT`（仍存在，但本轮 stop condition 已满足）
- `control_tower_daily_latest.json.profit_layer.breadth_alert` → 仍为 `YELLOW`/`STALE_ALERT_DATA`（非阻塞）

### [HIGH-2] 策略回撤触发 BUY_HALT
- **负责人**: `research_owner`（复核：`risk_owner`）
- **SLA**: `T+3`（满足"回撤<10%"或"人工评审结论落地"其一）
- **验收**: `runtime_truth.trading_status != "BUY_HALT"`；若仍 BUY_HALT，则需有已签字评审结论（非 `pending_manual_decision`）
- **验收命令**:
  ```bash
  jq -e '.runtime_truth.trading_status != "BUY_HALT"' research/reports/runtime_risk_state_latest.json
  jq -r '.drawdown_review.rows[] | select(.review_required==true) | [.strategy_id,.review_conclusion,.owner_signature] | @tsv' research/reports/strategy_governance_gate_latest.json
  ```
- **证据**: `runtime_risk_state_latest.json`, `strategy_governance_gate_latest.json`
- **当前态**: `strategy_max_drawdown_pct=24.52%`，阈值 10%；当前 `consecutive_trigger_days=1/3`，`review_required=false`

### [MEDIUM-3] strict_oos 告警陈旧（STALE_ALERT_DATA）
- **负责人**: `risk_owner`
- **SLA**: `T+1 11:30 CST` 前
- **验收**: `breadth_alert.stale == false` 且 `issue_codes` 不含 `STALE_ALERT_DATA`
- **验收命令**:
  ```bash
  jq -e '.profit_layer.breadth_alert.stale == false' research/reports/control_tower_daily_latest.json
  jq -e '(.profit_layer.breadth_alert.issue_codes // []) | index("STALE_ALERT_DATA") | not' research/reports/control_tower_daily_latest.json
  ```
- **证据**: `control_tower_daily_latest.json`
- **当前态**: `stale=true`, `signal_date=20260303`, `captured_at=31.4h ago`

### [MEDIUM-4] broker API 回退事件持续 YELLOW
- **负责人**: `platform_owner`（协同：`execution_owner`）
- **SLA**: 当日收盘后 15 分钟内完成回补或确认
- **验收**: `live_chain_failure_summary` 不再出现 `broker_api_skipped_fallback_to_ths`
- **验收命令**:
  ```bash
  jq -e '[(.events // [])[] | .reason] | index("broker_api_skipped_fallback_to_ths") | not' research/reports/live_chain_failure_summary_latest.json
  jq -r '.overall_status,.reason' research/reports/live_chain_failure_summary_latest.json
  ```
- **证据**: `live_chain_failure_summary_latest.json`, `live_cron_close.log`
- **当前态**: `status=YELLOW`, 原因 `broker_api_skipped_fallback_to_ths`

### [MEDIUM-5] event_watch 失败升级缺少真实演练样本
- **负责人**: `execution_owner`（协同：`cto_delegate`）
- **SLA**: 48 小时内完成一次受控演练并留痕
- **验收**: 至少一次 `event_watch_refresh` 失败样本进入失败汇总与 incident 台账
- **验收命令**:
  ```bash
  PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_run_intraday_risk_recheck.py::RunIntradayRiskRecheckTests::test_handle_event_watch_failure_escalates_and_sends_alert
  jq -e '[(.events // [])[] | select(.stage=="event_watch_refresh" and .severity=="RED")] | length > 0' research/reports/live_chain_failure_summary_latest.json
  jq -e '[(.incidents // [])[] | select(.system_area=="event_watch_refresh")] | length > 0' research/reports/incident_registry_latest.json
  ```
- **证据**: `live_chain_failure_summary_latest.json`, `incident_registry_latest.json`
- **当前态**: 机制已验证（测试通过），registry 无真实失败样本（event_watch 最近运行 ok）
- **备注**: 机制完整性已知，当前态为"等待真实样本验收"；非 bug

---

## 📈 量化策略 Roadmap（Phase 1-9 已完成，参考基线已确认）

**Project**: `/Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace/quant_projects/personal-a-share-research-system`

**当前推荐默认参数（2026-03-25 确认）**:
- overlay: `trend confirm tuned`
- params: `low_scale=0.20, weak_up_scale=0.70, neutral_down_scale=0.80, neutral_base_scale=0.80, strong_up_scale=1.00, ma_window=5`
- thresholds: `low_th=0.42, mid_th=0.50`
- stock pool: `adv20 >= 5000万`
- rebalance: 1-day
- metrics: annual 64.67%, mdd 19.67%, sharpe 2.298, wf_min_annual 47.96%, turnover 0.2313

**推荐下一步研究方向（优先级顺序）**:
1. **Sleeve staggered rebalance**: split portfolio into sleeves with staggered rebalance dates
2. **State-conditioned portfolio structure**: topk/n_drop/hold_thresh as regime functions
3. **Heterogeneous second signal**: genuinely different alpha source with regime-based switching
4. **Training focus**: modify prediction horizon / rolling window / sample weighting / retrain frequency

---

## 📋 Phase 1-9 结论归档（2026-03-25 确认）

| Phase | 内容 | 结论 |
|-------|------|------|
| 1 | Stock pool cleaning | `adv20 >= 5000万` adopt；drawdown 未改善 |
| 2 | Weighting scheme | 默认 TopkDropout 最优，不换 |
| 3 | Dynamic risk_degree | dynamic mild 次优，暂不替代 |
| 4 | Entry/exit decoupling | 不 adopt |
| 5 | Breadth overlay upgrade | `level+trend confirm` adopt，为新默认 |
| 5-F1 | Param sensitivity | 729 combos 全过 robust gate |
| 5-F2 | Threshold sensitivity | low_th=0.42/mid_th=0.50 最优 |
| 5-F3 | Pressure test | 5/5 scenarios 胜出 |
| 6 | Signal confirmation | 不 adopt |
| 8 | Framework upgrade | 不 adopt |
| 9 | Model ensemble | 不 adopt |

openclaw cron add --help && printf '
---RUNS HELP---
' && openclaw cron runs --help && printf '

🦞 OpenClaw 2026.3.28 (f9b1079) — Deployed locally, trusted globally, debugged eternally.

Usage: openclaw cron add|create [options]

Add a cron job

Options:
  --account <id>         Channel account id for delivery (multi-account setups)
  --agent <id>           Agent id for this job
  --announce             Announce summary to a chat (subagent-style) (default:
                         false)
  --at <when>            Run once at time (ISO with offset, or +duration). Use
                         --tz for offset-less datetimes
  --best-effort-deliver  Do not fail the job if delivery fails (default: false)
  --channel <channel>    Delivery channel (last) (default: "last")
  --cron <expr>          Cron expression (5-field or 6-field with seconds)
  --delete-after-run     Delete one-shot job after it succeeds (default: false)
  --deliver              Deprecated (use --announce). Announces a summary to a
                         chat.
  --description <text>   Optional description
  --disabled             Create job disabled (default: false)
  --every <duration>     Run every duration (e.g. 10m, 1h)
  --exact                Disable cron staggering (set stagger to 0) (default:
                         false)
  --expect-final         Wait for final response (agent) (default: false)
  -h, --help             Display help for command
  --json                 Output JSON (default: false)
  --keep-after-run       Keep one-shot job after it succeeds (default: false)
  --light-context        Use lightweight bootstrap context for agent jobs
                         (default: false)
  --message <text>       Agent message payload
  --model <model>        Model override for agent jobs (provider/model or alias)
  --name <name>          Job name
  --no-deliver           Disable announce delivery and skip main-session summary
  --session <target>     Session target (main|isolated)
  --session-key <key>    Session key for job routing (e.g.
                         agent:my-agent:my-session)
  --stagger <duration>   Cron stagger window (e.g. 30s, 5m)
  --system-event <text>  System event payload (main session)
  --thinking <level>     Thinking level for agent jobs
                         (off|minimal|low|medium|high|xhigh)
  --timeout <ms>         Timeout in ms (default: "30000")
  --timeout-seconds <n>  Timeout seconds for agent jobs
  --to <dest>            Delivery destination (E.164, Telegram chatId, or
                         Discord channel/user)
  --token <token>        Gateway token (if required)
  --tz <iana>            Timezone for cron expressions (IANA) (default: "")
  --url <url>            Gateway WebSocket URL (defaults to gateway.remote.url
                         when configured)
  --wake <mode>          Wake mode (now|next-heartbeat) (default: "now")

---RUNS HELP---

Usage: openclaw cron runs [options]

Show cron run history (JSONL-backed)

Options:
  --expect-final   Wait for final response (agent) (default: false)
  -h, --help       Display help for command
  --id <id>        Job id
  --limit <n>      Max entries (default 50) (default: "50")
  --timeout <ms>   Timeout in ms (default: "30000")
  --token <token>  Gateway token (if required)
  --url <url>      Gateway WebSocket URL (defaults to gateway.remote.url when
                   configured)

import json, pathlib
p=pathlib.Path('/Users/ling/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json')
print('exists', p.exists(), p)
if p.exists():
    data=json.loads(p.read_text())
    print(type(data).__name__)
    if isinstance(data,list):
        items=data
    else:
        items=data.get('jobs') or data.get('items') or data
    if isinstance(items,dict):
        items=list(items.values())
    for job in items:
        name=(job.get('name') or '')
        jid=job.get('id')
        msg=(job.get('message') or job.get('payload') or '')
        if any(k in json.dumps(job,ensure_ascii=False) for k in ['fusion','holdings','research','daily_quant_analysis','brief','feishu']):
            print('\nID',jid)
            print(json.dumps(job, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)[:5000])

content.thinking:
**Investigating old scripts**

I'm looking into the possibility of checking old scripts, specifically the publish bundle sources, to see if they might be using outdated holdings. I suspect that the `run_investment_research_org_publish_bundle.py` relies on `daily_investment_research_brief` or `today_stock_strategy_report`, so I'll need to inspect that further. 

There may also be an absence of a formal cron job for the fusion report, and I have to decide if we need to create a new one or if there's an existing setup. I need to figure out the right payload for calling the fusion report and sending the Feishu template as well. Lastly, I think I should check for any existing scripts in my local workspace. Let's search!

arguments.command: find /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace -type f \( -name '*.py' -o -name '*.sh' -o -name '*.md' -o -name '*.json' \) | grep -E 'fusion|holdings|publish_bundle|daily_quant_analysis_feishu|run_investment_research_org_publish_bundle|a-share-fusion-report' | sort | head -n 300

#!/usr/bin/env python3
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import json
import subprocess
import sys
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

from report_io import atomic_write_json

WORKSPACE = Path.home() / ".openclaw" / "workspace"
REPORT_DIR = WORKSPACE / "research" / "reports"
QUANT_PROJECT = WORKSPACE / "quant_projects" / "personal-a-share-research-system"
DAILY_STRATEGY_AUDIT = QUANT_PROJECT / "scripts" / "run_daily_strategy_audit.py"
STRATEGY_REPORT_GENERATOR = QUANT_PROJECT / "scripts" / "generate_today_stock_strategy_report.py"
DATA_SOURCE_HEALTH = WORKSPACE / "scripts" / "run_investment_research_data_source_health_probe.py"
EVENT_WATCH = WORKSPACE / "scripts" / "run_investment_research_event_watch.py"
TEMP_MEETING = WORKSPACE / "scripts" / "generate_investment_research_temporary_meeting_broadcast.py"
ORCHESTRATOR = WORKSPACE / "scripts" / "run_investment_research_org_orchestrator.py"
ROLE_BRIEFS = WORKSPACE / "scripts" / "run_investment_research_role_briefs.py"
GROUP_DIGEST = WORKSPACE / "scripts" / "generate_investment_research_group_digest.py"
CHIEF_DASHBOARD = WORKSPACE / "scripts" / "generate_investment_research_chief_dashboard.py"
CHIEF_CARD = WORKSPACE / "scripts" / "generate_investment_research_chief_card.py"
CHIEF_BROADCAST = WORKSPACE / "scripts" / "generate_investment_research_chief_broadcast.py"
CONTROL_TOWER = WORKSPACE / "scripts" / "generate_investment_research_control_tower.py"
CONTROL_TOWER_BROADCAST = WORKSPACE / "scripts" / "generate_investment_research_control_tower_broadcast.py"
CONTROL_TOWER_CARD = WORKSPACE / "scripts" / "generate_investment_research_control_tower_card.py"
REVIEW_LEDGER = WORKSPACE / "scripts" / "run_investment_research_review_ledger.py"
DELIVERY_PUSH = WORKSPACE / "scripts" / "push_investment_research_delivery.py"

MEETING_TOPICS = {
    "morning": "A股盘前会（发布bundle）",
    "midday": "A股午盘巡检会（发布bundle）",
    "close": "A股收盘复盘会（发布bundle）",
    "night": "A股夜间研究会（发布bundle）",
}

HEALTH_SCOPE = {
    "morning": "morning",
    "midday": "intraday",
    "close": "post_close",
    "night": "overnight",
}


def run(cmd: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    proc = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True, check=True)
    return [line.strip() for line in proc.stdout.splitlines() if line.strip()]


def run_optional(cmd: list[str], *, cwd: Path | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]:
    proc = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True, cwd=str(cwd) if cwd else None)
    return {
        "ok": proc.returncode == 0,
        "returncode": proc.returncode,
        "cmd": cmd,
        "stdout": [line.strip() for line in proc.stdout.splitlines() if line.strip()],
        "stderr": [line.strip() for line in proc.stderr.splitlines() if line.strip()],
    }


def maybe_load_json(path_str: str | None) -> dict | None:
    if not path_str:
        return None
    path = Path(path_str)
    if not path.exists():
        return None
    return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))


def load_report_json(outputs: list[str], stem_prefix: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
    for item in outputs:
        path = Path(item)
        if not path.exists() or path.suffix != ".json":
            continue
        if path.stem.startswith(stem_prefix):
            return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    return None


def main() -> None:
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Run full publish bundle for investment research org")
    ap.add_argument("--meeting-type", choices=["morning", "midday", "close", "night"], default="morning")
    args = ap.parse_args()

    REPORT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    now = datetime.now()
    meeting_type = args.meeting_type
    topic = MEETING_TOPICS[meeting_type]

    strategy_audit_refresh = None
    if DAILY_STRATEGY_AUDIT.exists():
        strategy_audit_refresh = run_optional([sys.executable, str(DAILY_STRATEGY_AUDIT)], cwd=QUANT_PROJECT)

    strategy_report_refresh = None
    if STRATEGY_REPORT_GENERATOR.exists():
        strategy_report_refresh = run_optional([sys.executable, str(STRATEGY_REPORT_GENERATOR)], cwd=QUANT_PROJECT)

    def safe_run(label: str, cmd: list[str]) -> list[str]:
        try:
            return run(cmd)
        except subprocess.CalledProcessError as e:
            print(f"[WARN] {label} failed (exit {e.returncode}), continuing pipeline", flush=True)
            return []

    data_source_health_outputs = safe_run("data_source_health", [sys.executable, str(DATA_SOURCE_HEALTH), "--scope", HEALTH_SCOPE[meeting_type]])
    event_watch_outputs = safe_run("event_watch", [sys.executable, str(EVENT_WATCH)])
    temporary_meeting_outputs = safe_run("temporary_meeting", [sys.executable, str(TEMP_MEETING)])
    orchestrator_outputs = safe_run("orchestrator", [sys.executable, str(ORCHESTRATOR), "--meeting-type", meeting_type, "--topic", topic])
    role_outputs = safe_run("role_briefs", [sys.executable, str(ROLE_BRIEFS), "--meeting-type", meeting_type])
    digest_outputs = safe_run("group_digest", [sys.executable, str(GROUP_DIGEST), "--meeting-type", meeting_type])

    dashboard_outputs = safe_run("chief_dashboard", [sys.executable, str(CHIEF_DASHBOARD), "--meeting-type", meeting_type])
    chief_card_outputs = safe_run("chief_card", [sys.executable, str(CHIEF_CARD), "--meeting-type", meeting_type])
    chief_broadcast_outputs = safe_run("chief_broadcast", [sys.executable, str(CHIEF_BROADCAST), "--meeting-type", meeting_type])
    control_tower_outputs = safe_run("control_tower", [sys.executable, str(CONTROL_TOWER), "--anchor-meeting", meeting_type])
    control_tower_broadcast_outputs = safe_run("control_tower_broadcast", [sys.executable, str(CONTROL_TOWER_BROADCAST)])
    control_tower_card_outputs = safe_run("control_tower_card", [sys.executable, str(CONTROL_TOWER_CARD)])
    review_ledger_outputs = safe_run("review_ledger", [sys.executable, str(REVIEW_LEDGER)]) if REVIEW_LEDGER.exists() else []

    data_source_health = load_report_json(data_source_health_outputs, "investment_research_data_source_health_")
    event_watch = load_report_json(event_watch_outputs, "investment_research_event_watch_")
    temporary_meeting = load_report_json(temporary_meeting_outputs, "investment_research_temporary_meeting_broadcast_")
    control_tower_payload = maybe_load_json(control_tower_outputs[-1] if control_tower_outputs else None)
    summary = {
        "generated_at": now.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
        "meeting_type": meeting_type,
        "strategy_audit_refresh": strategy_audit_refresh,
        "strategy_report_refresh": strategy_report_refresh,
        "data_source_health": data_source_health,
        "event_watch": event_watch,
        "temporary_meeting": temporary_meeting,
        "data_source_health_outputs": data_source_health_outputs,
        "event_watch_outputs": event_watch_outputs,
        "temporary_meeting_outputs": temporary_meeting_outputs,
        "orchestrator_outputs": orchestrator_outputs,

#!/usr/bin/env python3
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import json
import sys
from datetime import datetime
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

WORKSPACE = Path.home() / ".openclaw" / "workspace"
REPORT_DIR = WORKSPACE / "research" / "reports"
DUTY_CONFIG = WORKSPACE / "config" / "investment_research_duty_roster_v1.json"
INPUTS_CONFIG = WORKSPACE / "config" / "investment_research_org_inputs_v1.json"
DATA_SOURCE_POLICY = WORKSPACE / "config" / "investment_research_data_source_policy_v1.json"
SCRIPTS_DIR = WORKSPACE / "scripts"

sys.path.insert(0, str(SCRIPTS_DIR))
import run_investment_research_org_orchestrator as org  # noqa: E402
from investment_research_data_source_runtime import build_runtime_status, load_policy  # noqa: E402

CYCLE_TO_ROLE_FOCUS = {
    "pre_open": ["macro_researcher", "quant_analyst", "risk_officer", "trader", "chief_researcher"],
    "intraday": ["risk_officer", "trader", "industry_researcher", "chief_researcher"],
    "post_close": ["trader", "quant_analyst", "industry_researcher", "chief_researcher"],
    "overnight": ["macro_researcher", "industry_researcher", "quant_analyst", "buffett_avatar", "soros_avatar", "chief_researcher"],
}

ROLE_LABEL = {
    "macro_researcher": "🌍 宏观研究员",
    "industry_researcher": "🏭 行业研究员",
    "quant_analyst": "📊 量化分析师",
    "risk_officer": "🛡 风控官",
    "trader": "⚡ 交易员",
    "buffett_avatar": "💰 巴菲特分身",
    "soros_avatar": "🎯 索罗斯分身",
    "chief_researcher": "👨‍💼 首席研究员",
}

CYCLE_LABEL = {
    "pre_open": "盘前",
    "intraday": "盘中",
    "post_close": "盘后",
    "overnight": "隔夜",
}

STATUS_LABEL = {
    "PASS": "通过",
    "OK": "正常",
    "healthy": "健康",
    "watch_guarded": "警戒观察",
    "offhours_guarded": "非交易时段观察",
    "degraded": "降级",
    "triggered": "已触发",
    "observe_defensive": "防守观察",
    "conditional_active": "条件化推进",
}

SOURCE_LABEL = {
    "akshare": "聚合行情库",
    "ths_account": "同花顺账户",
    "tushare": "图莎财经数据",
    "yfinance": "雅虎财经",
}


def load_json(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
    return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))


def cn_bool(value: Any) -> str:
    if value is True:
        return "是"
    if value is False:
        return "否"
    return str(value)


def cn_status(value: Any) -> str:
    if value is None:
        return "-"
    return STATUS_LABEL.get(str(value), str(value))


def cn_source(value: str) -> str:
    return SOURCE_LABEL.get(value, value)


def cn_sources(values: list[str]) -> str:
    if not values:
        return "暂无"
    return ", ".join(cn_source(v) for v in values)


def cn_reason(value: Any) -> str:
    if value is None:
        return "-"
    text = str(value)
    replacements = {
        "health_probe:": "健康探针：",
        "system_gate_warning:": "系统门控预警：",
        "watch_guarded": "警戒观察",
        "healthy": "健康",
        "degraded": "降级",
        "observe_defensive": "防守观察",
        "audit_status": "审计状态",
        "precheck_status": "盘前强检状态",
    }
    for old, new in replacements.items():
        text = text.replace(old, new)
    return text


def cn_action(value: str) -> str:
    text = value
    replacements = {
        "切换到observe_defensive模式": "切换到防守观察模式",
        "切换到observe_defensive": "切换到防守观察",
        "停止输出可执行倾向": "停止输出可执行倾向",
        "触发临时会商监控告警": "触发临时会商监控告警",
        "在chief broadcast中提示数据源异常": "在首席播报中提示数据源异常",
        "保持 risk_off / observe_defensive，不输出可执行买价": "保持风险收缩/防守观察，不输出可执行买价",
    }
    for old, new in replacements.items():
        text = text.replace(old, new)
    return text
    return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))


def build_role_note(role_id: str, snapshot: dict[str, Any], summary: dict[str, Any]) -> list[str]:
    strategy = snapshot.get("strategy", {})
    live_system = snapshot.get("live_system", {})
    app_sync = snapshot.get("app_sync", {})
    priority = summary.get("priority_display", [])
    sell_list = summary.get("sell_display_list", [])[:5]
    holdings_preview = summary.get("holdings_preview_display", [])[:5]
    trades_preview = summary.get("trades_preview_display", [])[:5]

    if role_id == "macro_researcher":
        return [
            f"当前风险偏好偏{'防守' if summary.get('risk_off') else '均衡/进攻'}。",
            f"审计状态 {summary.get('audit_status')}，盘前强检 {summary.get('precheck_status')}。",
            "持续盯美元、美债、原油、黄金与外盘情绪传导。",
        ]
    if role_id == "industry_researcher":
        return [
            f"优先候选行业链路围绕 {', '.join(priority) if priority else '当前候选池'} 展开跟踪。",
            "持续记录主线是否切换、行业催化是否兑现。",
            "对弱势板块和高位题材保持去伪存真。",
        ]
    if role_id == "quant_analyst":
        return [
            f"当前年化/回撤/夏普为 {summary.get('annual_return_pct')}/{summary.get('max_drawdown_pct')}/{summary.get('sharpe')}。",
            f"BUY 候选 {strategy.get('buy_candidates', '-')}, SELL 候选 {strategy.get('sell_candidates', '-')}。",
            "持续监控实时执行环境与历史基线是否偏离。",
        ]
    if role_id == "risk_officer":
        return [
            f"当前风险收缩标记：{cn_bool(summary.get('risk_off'))}。",
            f"持仓/成交行数：{summary.get('holdings_rows')}/{summary.get('trades_rows')}。",
            "任何不满足门控条件的动作都应继续拦截。",
        ]
    if role_id == "trader":
        return [
            f"当前观察池：{', '.join(priority) if priority else '暂无'}。",
            f"减仓复核名单：{', '.join(sell_list) if sell_list else '暂无'}。",
            f"持仓预览：{', '.join(holdings_preview) if holdings_preview else '暂无'}。",
            f"近期成交预览：{', '.join([t for t in trades_preview if t]) if trades_preview else '暂无'}。",
            "维持条件化计划，不在非交易时段输出可执行买价。",
        ]
    if role_id == "buffett_avatar":
        return [
            "夜间重点审视候选池的商业质量和长期赔率。",
            f"组合基线年化 {live_system.get('portfolio_annual_return_pct', '-')}%，但执行层不能因高收益忽视安全边际。",
            "过滤高热度低质量机会。",
        ]
    if role_id == "soros_avatar":
        return [
            "持续观察是否有风险偏好拐点与叙事强化。",
            "重点留意商品、地缘、利率变化是否触发二次冲击。",
            "在趋势真正反转前，不主张过早重仓押注。",
        ]
    if role_id == "chief_researcher":
        return [
            "汇总异动、分歧与待决策事项。",
            f"当前组织结论仍为：{'偏防守' if summary.get('risk_off') else '可条件化推进'}。",
            "必要时触发临时会商，而不是等到固定会议窗口。",
        ]
    return ["暂无"]


def main() -> None:
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Run always-on background cycle for investment research org")
    ap.add_argument("--cycle", choices=["pre_open", "intraday", "post_close", "overnight"], default="overnight")
    args = ap.parse_args()

    now = datetime.now()
    REPORT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    duty_cfg = load_json(DUTY_CONFIG)
    role_map = {r["id"]: r for r in duty_cfg.get("roles", [])}
    inputs_cfg = load_json(INPUTS_CONFIG)
    snapshot = org.build_input_snapshot(inputs_cfg)
    summary = org.make_summary(snapshot, now)

    focused_roles = CYCLE_TO_ROLE_FOCUS[args.cycle]
    policy = load_policy(DATA_SOURCE_POLICY)
    source_runtime = build_runtime_status(policy, summary=summary, role_ids=focused_roles, cycle=args.cycle)
    outputs = []
    md_lines = [
        f"# 来福投研会 - 常驻值班周期（{CYCLE_LABEL.get(args.cycle, args.cycle)}）",
        "",
        f"- 生成时间：{now:%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S}",
        f"- 周期目标：{duty_cfg['cycles'][args.cycle]['goal']}",
        f"- 审计状态：{cn_status(summary.get('audit_status', 'unknown'))}",
        f"- 风险收缩：{cn_bool(summary.get('risk_off', '-'))}",
        f"- 数据源状态：{cn_status(source_runtime.get('status'))}",
        f"- 本轮主源：{cn_sources(source_runtime.get('primary_sources', []))}",
        f"- 本轮确认源：{cn_sources(source_runtime.get('confirmation_sources', []))}",
        "",
    ]

    for role_id in focused_roles:
        role = role_map[role_id]
        notes = build_role_note(role_id, snapshot, summary)
        payload = {
            "generated_at": now.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
            "cycle": args.cycle,
            "role_id": role_id,
            "role_label": ROLE_LABEL[role_id],
            "duties": role.get("duties", []),
            "outputs": role.get("outputs", []),
            "notes": notes,
            "summary": summary,
            "data_source_runtime": source_runtime,
        }
        md_path = REPORT_DIR / f"investment_research_background_{role_id}_{args.cycle}_{now:%Y%m%d}.md"
        json_path = REPORT_DIR / f"investment_research_background_{role_id}_{args.cycle}_{now:%Y%m%d}.json"
        md_content = [
            f"# 来福投研会 - {ROLE_LABEL[role_id]} 常驻值班卡",
            "",
            f"- 生成时间：{now:%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S}",
            f"- 周期：{CYCLE_LABEL.get(args.cycle, args.cycle)}",
            "",
            "## 当前职责",
        ]
        for item in role.get("duties", []):
            md_content.append(f"- {item}")
        md_content.append("")
        md_content.append("## 本轮输出")
        for item in notes:
            md_content.append(f"- {item}")
        md_content.append("")
        md_content.append("## 数据源策略")
        md_content.append(f"- 状态：{cn_status(source_runtime.get('status'))}")
        md_content.append(f"- 主源：{cn_sources(source_runtime.get('primary_sources', []))}")
        md_content.append(f"- 确认源：{cn_sources(source_runtime.get('confirmation_sources', []))}")
        md_content.append(f"- 角色绑定源：{cn_sources(source_runtime.get('role_sources', []))}")
        md_content.append(f"- 判定说明：{cn_reason(source_runtime.get('reason'))}")
        if source_runtime.get('recommended_actions'):
            md_content.append("- 降级后动作：")
            for action in source_runtime.get('recommended_actions', []):
                md_content.append(f"  - {cn_action(action)}")
        md_content.append("")
        md_path.write_text("\n".join(md_content) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
        json_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
        outputs.append({"role_id": role_id, "md": str(md_path), "json": str(json_path)})
        print(md_path)
        print(json_path)

        md_lines.append(f"## {ROLE_LABEL[role_id]}")
        for item in notes:
            md_lines.append(f"- {item}")
        md_lines.append("")

    md_lines.append("## 数据源策略")
    md_lines.append(f"- 状态：{cn_status(source_runtime.get('status'))}")
    md_lines.append(f"- 主源：{cn_sources(source_runtime.get('primary_sources', []))}")
    md_lines.append(f"- 确认源：{cn_sources(source_runtime.get('confirmation_sources', []))}")
    md_lines.append(f"- 角色绑定源：{cn_sources(source_runtime.get('role_sources', []))}")
    md_lines.append(f"- 判定说明：{cn_reason(source_runtime.get('reason'))}")
    if source_runtime.get('recommended_actions'):
        md_lines.append("- 降级后动作：")
        for action in source_runtime.get('recommended_actions', []):
            md_lines.append(f"  - {cn_action(action)}")
    md_lines.append("")

    summary_path = REPORT_DIR / f"investment_research_background_cycle_{args.cycle}_{now:%Y%m%d}.json"
    summary_path.write_text(json.dumps({
        "generated_at": now.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
        "cycle": args.cycle,
        "outputs": outputs,
        "summary": summary,
        "data_source_runtime": source_runtime,
    }, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    md_summary_path = REPORT_DIR / f"investment_research_background_cycle_{args.cycle}_{now:%Y%m%d}.md"
    md_summary_path.write_text("\n".join(md_lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    print(md_summary_path)
    print(summary_path)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

content.text:
---
name: a-share-fusion-report
description: "Generate a unified A-share report by combining three installed skills: stock-daily-report (HTML/PNG professional report), stock-watcher (fast structured quote fallback), and akshare-stock (fund-flow overlay). Use when you need one reliable daily report from current holdings, automatic fallback if one data source fails, and optional Feishu push (especially for trading-day 09:25 automation)."
---

# A-Share Fusion Report

Run this skill when you want one consolidated output instead of manually running multiple stock skills.

## What this skill does

1. Loads holdings codes from your latest portfolio source (priority):
   - `quant_projects/personal-a-share-research-system/research/reports/ths_web_holding_count_fix_*.json`
   - fallback: `.../ths_app_holdings_*.csv`
2. Syncs watchlists to both engines:
   - `skills/stock-daily-report/config.json`
   - `~/.clawdbot/stock_watcher/watchlist.txt`
3. Generates a professional report via `stock-daily-report`.
4. Adds fallback quote lines from `stock-watcher`.
5. Adds `akshare-stock` fund-flow overlay (top-N symbols).
6. Outputs merged markdown + json summary and can push to Feishu.

## Commands

### A) Fast local test (no push)

```bash
python3 skills/a-share-fusion-report/scripts/run_fusion_report.py --limit 5
```

### B) Full holdings run + Feishu push

```bash
python3 skills/a-share-fusion-report/scripts/run_fusion_report.py --push-feishu
```

### C) Trading-day only guard

```bash
python3 skills/a-share-fusion-report/scripts/run_fusion_report.py --trading-day-only --push-feishu
```

### D) Install 09:25 weekday cron

```bash
bash skills/a-share-fusion-report/scripts/install_cron_0925.sh
```

## Key output

Default output directory:
`quant_projects/personal-a-share-research-system/research/reports`

Generated files:
- `a-share-fusion-report_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.md`
- `a-share-fusion-report_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.json`
- plus `stock-daily-report` generated HTML/PNG files

## Notes

- The script keeps non-6-digit codes (e.g. HK) in universe logs but only sends 6-digit symbols to A-share engines.
- If `stock-daily-report` fails, fallback quote lines from `stock-watcher` are still captured in the merged report.
- If akshare network is unstable, report still succeeds with partial overlay.

#!/usr/bin/env python3
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import csv
import json
import os
import re
import subprocess
from datetime import date, datetime
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

WORKSPACE = Path.home() / ".openclaw" / "workspace"
DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR = (
    WORKSPACE / "quant_projects" / "personal-a-share-research-system" / "research" / "reports"
)
STOCK_DAILY_DIR = WORKSPACE / "skills" / "stock-daily-report"
STOCK_DAILY_CONFIG = STOCK_DAILY_DIR / "config.json"
STOCK_WATCHER_WATCHLIST = Path.home() / ".clawdbot" / "stock_watcher" / "watchlist.txt"
AKSHARE_STOCK_CLI = Path.home() / ".openclaw" / "skills" / "akshare-stock" / "scripts" / "stock_cli.py"
STOCK_WATCHER_SUMMARY = (
    Path.home() / ".openclaw" / "skills" / "stock-watcher" / "scripts" / "summarize_performance.py"
)


def normalize_code(raw: Any) -> str | None:
    s = str(raw or "").strip().upper()
    if not s:
        return None
    # SH600519 / SZ000001 -> digits
    if len(s) >= 8 and s[:2] in {"SH", "SZ", "BJ", "HK"} and s[2:].isdigit():
        s = s[2:]
    # 600519.SH -> 600519
    if "." in s:
        s = s.split(".", 1)[0]

    s = re.sub(r"\D", "", s)
    if len(s) in {5, 6}:
        return s
    return None


def latest_file(root: Path, pattern: str) -> Path | None:
    files = [p for p in root.glob(pattern) if p.is_file()]
    if not files:
        return None
    files.sort(key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime, reverse=True)
    return files[0]


def load_codes_from_web_fix(report_dir: Path) -> tuple[list[str], str]:
    p = latest_file(report_dir, "ths_web_holding_count_fix_*.json")
    if not p:
        return [], ""
    try:
        payload = json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        codes = [normalize_code(x) for x in (payload.get("codes") or [])]
        codes = [c for c in codes if c]
        return dedupe(codes), str(p)
    except Exception:
        return [], str(p)


def load_codes_from_local_holdings(report_dir: Path) -> tuple[list[str], str]:
    p = latest_file(report_dir, "ths_app_holdings_*.csv")
    if not p:
        return [], ""

    codes: list[str] = []
    try:
        with p.open("r", encoding="utf-8-sig", newline="") as f:
            reader = csv.DictReader(f)
            for row in reader:
                code = normalize_code(row.get("symbol"))
                if code:
                    codes.append(code)
    except Exception:
        return [], str(p)

    return dedupe(codes), str(p)


def dedupe(items: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    seen = set()
    out: list[str] = []
    for x in items:
        if x in seen:
            continue
        seen.add(x)
        out.append(x)
    return out


def split_a_share(codes: list[str]) -> tuple[list[str], list[str]]:
    a_share = [c for c in codes if len(c) == 6]
    non_a = [c for c in codes if len(c) != 6]
    return a_share, non_a


def sync_stock_daily_config(codes_6d: list[str], output_dir: Path) -> None:
    STOCK_DAILY_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    cfg: dict[str, Any] = {}
    if STOCK_DAILY_CONFIG.exists():
        try:
            cfg = json.loads(STOCK_DAILY_CONFIG.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        except Exception:
            cfg = {}

    cfg["stocks"] = [{"code": c, "name": c} for c in codes_6d]
    cfg.setdefault("report_prefix", "stock-daily-report")
    cfg.setdefault("output_format", "both")
    cfg["output_dir"] = str(output_dir)

    STOCK_DAILY_CONFIG.write_text(json.dumps(cfg, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")


def sync_stock_watcher_watchlist(codes: list[str]) -> None:
    STOCK_WATCHER_WATCHLIST.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    lines = [f"{c}|{c}" for c in codes]
    STOCK_WATCHER_WATCHLIST.write_text("\n".join(lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")


def run_cmd(cmd: list[str], cwd: Path | None = None, timeout: int = 300) -> tuple[int, str, str]:
    p = subprocess.run(
        cmd,
        cwd=str(cwd) if cwd else None,
        capture_output=True,
        text=True,
        timeout=timeout,
    )
    return p.returncode, p.stdout or "", p.stderr or ""


def run_stock_daily_report(codes_6d: list[str], output_dir: Path, report_prefix: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    if not codes_6d:
        return {"ok": False, "reason": "no_6digit_a_share_codes"}

    ts = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    output_base = output_dir / f"{report_prefix}_{ts}"
    cmd = [
        "python3",
        "generate_report.py",
        "--stocks",
        ",".join(codes_6d),
        "--format",
        "both",
        "--output",
        str(output_base),
    ]
    rc, out, err = run_cmd(cmd, cwd=STOCK_DAILY_DIR, timeout=900)

    html_file = Path(str(output_base) + ".html")
    img_file = Path(str(output_base) + ".png")

    return {
        "ok": rc == 0 and html_file.exists(),
        "returncode": rc,
        "stdout_tail": "\n".join(out.strip().splitlines()[-20:]),
        "stderr_tail": "\n".join(err.strip().splitlines()[-20:]),
        "html_file": str(html_file) if html_file.exists() else "",
        "image_file": str(img_file) if img_file.exists() else "",
    }


def run_stock_watcher_summary() -> dict[str, Any]:
    if not STOCK_WATCHER_SUMMARY.exists():
        return {"ok": False, "reason": "stock_watcher_not_installed"}

    rc, out, err = run_cmd(["python3", str(STOCK_WATCHER_SUMMARY)], timeout=240)
    lines = [ln for ln in out.splitlines() if ln.strip()]
    return {
        "ok": rc == 0 and len(lines) > 0,
        "returncode": rc,
        "lines": lines[:120],
        "stderr_tail": "\n".join(err.strip().splitlines()[-20:]),
    }


def fetch_akshare_flow(code: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
    if not AKSHARE_STOCK_CLI.exists():
        return None

    rc, out, _ = run_cmd(["python3", str(AKSHARE_STOCK_CLI), "flow", "--symbol", code], timeout=120)
    if rc != 0:
        return None
    try:
        rows = json.loads(out)
        if not isinstance(rows, list) or not rows:
            return None
        row = rows[0]
        return {
            "code": code,
            "date": row.get("日期"),
            "close": row.get("收盘价"),
            "pct": row.get("涨跌幅"),
            "main_inflow": row.get("主力净流入-净额"),
            "main_inflow_ratio": row.get("主力净流入-净占比"),
        }
    except Exception:
        return None


def is_trading_day() -> bool:
    try:
        import akshare as ak  # type: ignore

        today = date.today().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
        df = ak.tool_trade_date_hist_sina()
        s = set(df["trade_date"].dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d").tolist())
        return today in s
    except Exception:
        return date.today().weekday() < 5


def push_to_feishu(target_user: str, message: str, image_file: str = "") -> tuple[bool, str]:
    cmd = [
        "openclaw",
        "message",
        "send",
        "--channel",
        "feishu",
        "--account",
        "default",
        "--target",
        target_user,
        "-m",
        message,
    ]
    if image_file and Path(image_file).exists():
        cmd.extend(["--media", image_file])

    rc, out, err = run_cmd(cmd, timeout=90)
    ok = rc == 0
    info = (out.strip() or err.strip())[-1000:]
    return ok, info


def build_markdown(
    out_file: Path,
    source_file: str,
    all_codes: list[str],
    a_share_codes: list[str],
    non_a_codes: list[str],
    stock_daily: dict[str, Any],
    watcher: dict[str, Any],
    flow_rows: list[dict[str, Any]],
) -> None:
    lines = [
        f"# A-Share Fusion Report ({datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')})",
        "",
        "## Universe",
        f"- Source: `{source_file or '-'}'",
        f"- Total holdings codes: **{len(all_codes)}**",
        f"- A-share 6-digit codes: **{len(a_share_codes)}**",
    ]
    if non_a_codes:
        lines.append(f"- Non A-share / unsupported codes: `{', '.join(non_a_codes)}`")

    lines += [
        "",
        "## Report Engine (stock-daily-report)",
        f"- Status: **{'OK' if stock_daily.get('ok') else 'FAILED'}**",
        f"- HTML: `{stock_daily.get('html_file', '') or '-'}`",
        f"- Image: `{stock_daily.get('image_file', '') or '-'}`",
    ]

    lines += [
        "",
        "## Fast Quotes Fallback (stock-watcher)",
        f"- Status: **{'OK' if watcher.get('ok') else 'FAILED'}**",
    ]
    for ln in (watcher.get("lines") or [])[:15]:
        lines.append(f"- {ln}")

    lines += ["", "## Professional Overlay (akshare fund flow)"]
    if flow_rows:
        lines += [
            "",
            "| code | date | close | pct | main_inflow | main_inflow_ratio |",
            "|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|",
        ]
        for r in flow_rows:
            lines.append(
                f"| {r.get('code')} | {r.get('date')} | {r.get('close')} | {r.get('pct')} | {r.get('main_inflow')} | {r.get('main_inflow_ratio')} |"
            )
    else:
        lines.append("- 暂无可用资金流数据（网络/接口限制）。")

    out_file.write_text("\n".join(lines), encoding="utf-8")


def main() -> None:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Fuse stock-watcher + akshare-stock + stock-daily-report")
    parser.add_argument("--codes", default="", help="Override codes, comma-separated")
    parser.add_argument("--limit", type=int, default=0, help="Limit number of A-share codes for fast testing")
    parser.add_argument("--output-dir", default=str(DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR))
    parser.add_argument("--report-prefix", default="a-share-fusion-report")
    parser.add_argument("--akshare-top", type=int, default=8)
    parser.add_argument("--push-feishu", action="store_true")
    parser.add_argument("--target-user", default="user:ou_968a615509dc191f04220e18cda67080")
    parser.add_argument("--trading-day-only", action="store_true")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    if args.trading_day_only and not is_trading_day():
        print(json.dumps({"status": "SKIP_NON_TRADING_DAY", "date": str(date.today())}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
        return

    output_dir = Path(args.output_dir).expanduser().resolve()
    output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

    if args.codes.strip():
        all_codes = dedupe([c for c in (normalize_code(x) for x in args.codes.split(",")) if c])
        source_file = "--codes"
    else:
        codes, source_file = load_codes_from_web_fix(output_dir)
        if not codes:
            codes, source_file = load_codes_from_local_holdings(output_dir)
        all_codes = codes

    a_share_codes, non_a_codes = split_a_share(all_codes)
    if args.limit and args.limit > 0:
        a_share_codes = a_share_codes[: args.limit]

    sync_stock_daily_config(a_share_codes, output_dir)
    sync_stock_watcher_watchlist(all_codes)

    stock_daily = run_stock_daily_report(a_share_codes, output_dir, args.report_prefix)
    watcher = run_stock_watcher_summary()

    flow_rows: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    for c in a_share_codes[: max(0, args.akshare_top)]:
        row = fetch_akshare_flow(c)
        if row:
            flow_rows.append(row)

    ts = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
    md_file = output_dir / f"{args.report_prefix}_{ts}.md"
    json_file = output_dir / f"{args.report_prefix}_{ts}.json"

    build_markdown(
        out_file=md_file,
        source_file=source_file,
        all_codes=all_codes,
        a_share_codes=a_share_codes,
        non_a_codes=non_a_codes,
        stock_daily=stock_daily,
        watcher=watcher,
        flow_rows=flow_rows,
    )

    result = {
        "generated_at": datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
        "source_file": source_file,
        "all_codes": all_codes,
        "a_share_codes": a_share_codes,
        "non_a_codes": non_a_codes,
        "stock_daily": stock_daily,
        "stock_watcher": {
            "ok": watcher.get("ok", False),
            "sample": (watcher.get("lines") or [])[:5],
        },
        "akshare_flow_rows": flow_rows,
        "output": {
            "markdown": str(md_file),
            "json": str(json_file),
        },
    }

    if args.push_feishu:
        msg = (
            "📈 A股融合报告已生成\n"
            f"- 持仓代码数: {len(all_codes)}\n"
            f"- A股代码数: {len(a_share_codes)}\n"
            f"- HTML: {stock_daily.get('html_file') or '-'}\n"
            f"- MD: {md_file}"
        )
        ok, info = push_to_feishu(
            target_user=args.target_user,
            message=msg,
            image_file=stock_daily.get("image_file", ""),
        )
        result["feishu_push"] = {"ok": ok, "info": info}

    json_file.write_text(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
RUNNER="$SCRIPT_DIR/run_fusion_report.py"
LOG_FILE="/tmp/a-share-fusion-report.log"

if [[ ! -f "$RUNNER" ]]; then
  echo "Runner not found: $RUNNER"
  exit 1
fi

TMP_CRON=$(mktemp)
(crontab -l 2>/dev/null || true) | grep -v "A_SHARE_FUSION_REPORT_0925" > "$TMP_CRON"
echo "25 9 * * 1-5 python3 $RUNNER --trading-day-only --push-feishu >> $LOG_FILE 2>&1 # A_SHARE_FUSION_REPORT_0925" >> "$TMP_CRON"
crontab "$TMP_CRON"
rm -f "$TMP_CRON"

echo "Installed cron: A_SHARE_FUSION_REPORT_0925"
crontab -l | grep "A_SHARE_FUSION_REPORT_0925" || true

🦞 OpenClaw 2026.3.28 (f9b1079) — I'm the assistant your terminal demanded, not the one your sleep schedule requested.

Usage: openclaw cron edit [options] <id>

Edit a cron job (patch fields)

Arguments:
  id                                   Job id

Options:
  --account <id>                       Channel account id for delivery
                                       (multi-account setups)
  --agent <id>                         Set agent id
  --announce                           Announce summary to a chat
                                       (subagent-style)
  --at <when>                          Set one-shot time (ISO) or duration like
                                       20m
  --best-effort-deliver                Do not fail job if delivery fails
  --channel <channel>                  Delivery channel (last)
  --clear-agent                        Unset agent and use default (default:
                                       false)
  --clear-session-key                  Unset session key (default: false)
  --cron <expr>                        Set cron expression
  --delete-after-run                   Delete one-shot job after it succeeds
                                       (default: false)
  --deliver                            Deprecated (use --announce). Announces a
                                       summary to a chat.
  --description <text>                 Set description
  --disable                            Disable job (default: false)
  --enable                             Enable job (default: false)
  --every <duration>                   Set interval duration like 10m
  --exact                              Disable cron staggering (set stagger to
                                       0)
  --expect-final                       Wait for final response (agent) (default:
                                       false)
  --failure-alert                      Enable failure alerts for this job
  --failure-alert-account-id <id>      Account ID for failure alert channel
                                       (multi-account setups)
  --failure-alert-after <n>            Alert after N consecutive job errors
  --failure-alert-channel <channel>    Failure alert channel (last)
  --failure-alert-cooldown <duration>  Minimum time between alerts (e.g. 1h,
                                       30m)
  --failure-alert-mode <mode>          Failure alert delivery mode (announce or
                                       webhook)
  --failure-alert-to <dest>            Failure alert destination
  -h, --help                           Display help for command
  --keep-after-run                     Keep one-shot job after it succeeds
                                       (default: false)
  --light-context                      Enable lightweight bootstrap context for
                                       agent jobs
  --message <text>                     Set agentTurn payload message
  --model <model>                      Model override for agent jobs
  --name <name>                        Set name
  --no-best-effort-deliver             Fail job when delivery fails
  --no-deliver                         Disable announce delivery
  --no-failure-alert                   Disable failure alerts for this job
  --no-light-context                   Disable lightweight bootstrap context for
                                       agent jobs
  --session <target>                   Session target (main|isolated)
  --session-key <key>                  Set session key for job routing
  --stagger <duration>                 Cron stagger window (e.g. 30s, 5m)
  --system-event <text>                Set systemEvent payload
  --thinking <level>                   Thinking level for agent jobs
                                       (off|minimal|low|medium|high|xhigh)
  --timeout <ms>                       Timeout in ms (default: "30000")
  --timeout-seconds <n>                Timeout seconds for agent jobs
  --to <dest>                          Delivery destination (E.164, Telegram
                                       chatId, or Discord channel/user)
  --token <token>                      Gateway token (if required)
  --tz <iana>                          Timezone for cron expressions (IANA)
  --url <url>                          Gateway WebSocket URL (defaults to
                                       gateway.remote.url when configured)
  --wake <mode>                        Wake mode (now|next-heartbeat)

content.text: 我先把现在实际产出这版 fusion runner 的源码路径找出来；找不到就做一个明确 wrapper，把已验证链固定下来，再挂 cron。这样 job payload 才不是“口头指向”。

arguments.command: grep -R -n "Latest summary JSON" /Users/ling/.openclaw --include='*.py' --include='*.md' --include='*.sh' --include='*.json' 2>/dev/null | head -n 100

grep -R -n "ths_web_selected_holdings_latest.meta.json\|latest_run_summary_txt\|input_snapshot_csv" /Users/ling/.openclaw --include='*.py' --include='*.md' --include='*.sh' --include='*.json' 2>/dev/null | head -n 200
